item.title: Lexus Shocks Need Replacement
item.description: A look at failed shocks on a Lexus and what that means for ride quality, handling, and repair planning.

item.title: Coffee Spill Repair Costs
item.description: A small coffee spill can lead to a surprisingly large repair bill. This video highlights the real-world cost of interior damage and cleanup.

media:content.media:description: A small coffee spill can lead to a surprisingly large repair bill. This video highlights the real-world cost of interior damage and cleanup.

item.title: Why a $3 Part Can Cost $2,000 to Fix
item.description: A look at how a cheap part can lead to a much bigger repair bill, with practical insight into diagnostics, labor, and repair costs.

item.title: Loose Part Diagnosis on a Car
item.description: A quick look at a loose automotive part, why it needs attention. Useful for spotting issues early and understanding basic repair concerns.
